generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder providing position data for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder behind gearbox providing position data for the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current I_M for the motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance DerivedTorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor, MotorEncoder
]

instance DerivedAngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance TorqueDataTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque data trace for friction model identification"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedTorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, DahlFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel
]

instance AngularVelocityDataTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity data trace for friction model identification"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedAngularVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, DahlFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel
]

instance CurrentDataTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Current measurement data trace"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, DahlFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel
]

instance PositionDataTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position measurement data trace"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted, SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, DahlFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel
]

instance SysMLBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLForMBSE
]

instance SysMLIBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLForMBSE
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulink
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulink
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulink
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulink
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor with current input I_M and torque output τ_M for first axis"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component in the first axis transmission"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for axis control"
]

instance RobotAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot, including motor, gearwheel, cycloidal gearbox, and CNC controller"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController
]

instance SysMLForMBSE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool for Model-Based Systems Engineering"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance MathWorksSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for simulation of friction models"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousFrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShells : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for standardized digital asset representation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousFrictionModelIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance MQTTDataStreaming : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, ContinuousFrictionModelIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance DashboardVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tool for real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of robot axis data in dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousFrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of white-box and black-box friction models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelIdentificationInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model-based control for improving motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyImprovementAction
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of robot axis parameters for monitoring"
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights from friction model identification used to adjust control algorithms"
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust robot control algorithms for improved motion accuracy based on friction model identification"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing with continuous updates during robot operation for friction model refinement."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A one-way data flow system integrating structural (SysML) and behavioral (Simulink) models with live sensor data via processing components to form a digital shadow for the first axis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated, using live operational data from the physical robot during active use."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through deviation analysis between simulated and measured data to assess friction model accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Industrie 4.0 standards via Asset Administration Shells (AAS) and SysML for modeling."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety cell restricts working range, but no specific DT-related security or safety measures described."
]
